1700 Joliet St, West Chicago, IL 60185, USA
An old pear tree on the site of Kress Creek Farms Park in West Chicago. It is near the old barns and silos. Seems to bear fruit in September. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.

Several black raspberry plants around the corner from the event pavilion, right before the farm's orchard. These seem to be growing wild but maybe still ask if they're okay to take, the workers here are cool. Found in early July and weren't quite ripe yet. Fal
